evals.name: should-trigger-open-url
evals.prompt: Open https://staging.example.com and check if it loads

evals.name: should-trigger-screenshot
evals.prompt: Take a screenshot of the homepage

evals.name: should-trigger-qa-deploy
evals.prompt: QA the staging deploy and verify the login page works

evals.name: should-trigger-smoke-test
evals.prompt: Run a smoke test on our production site

evals.name: should-trigger-check-console
evals.prompt: Check if there are any JS errors on the dashboard page
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers, navigates and checks console

evals.name: should-trigger-mobile-check
evals.prompt: Does the landing page look ok on mobile?

evals.name: should-trigger-network-debug
evals.prompt: The API calls on the settings page seem slow, can you check?

evals.name: should-trigger-dogfood
evals.prompt: Dogfood the new feature on staging before we ship

evals.name: should-NOT-trigger-unit-tests
evals.prompt: Run the unit tests for the auth module
evals.expected_output: Skill does NOT trigger, this is about code tests not browser testing

evals.name: should-NOT-trigger-api-curl
evals.prompt: Call the /api/users endpoint and check the response
evals.expected_output: Skill does NOT trigger, this is an API call not a browser flow
assertions: Uses curl or fetch, not browser

evals.name: should-NOT-trigger-css-edit
evals.prompt: Change the button color to blue in the CSS file
evals.expected_output: Skill does NOT trigger, this is a code edit

evals.name: should-NOT-trigger-git-ops
evals.prompt: Push the changes and create a PR
evals.expected_output: Skill does NOT trigger, this is git workflow

evals.name: should-NOT-trigger-docker
evals.prompt: Build the Docker image and check it starts correctly
evals.expected_output: Skill does NOT trigger, this is container ops

evals.name: should-NOT-trigger-database
evals.prompt: Check the database schema and run migrations
evals.expected_output: Skill does NOT trigger, this is database ops

evals.name: should-NOT-trigger-read-file
evals.prompt: Read the config file and explain what each setting does
evals.expected_output: Skill does NOT trigger, file reading not browsing
assertions: Reads local file, no browser involved

evals.name: should-NOT-trigger-perf-benchmark
evals.expected_output: Skill does NOT trigger, code benchmark not browser
assertions: Runs code benchmark, not browser test
